examples: A novel two-phase model for the fluidize bed of polyethylene with condensed mode operation was proposed.
The height computation model of fluidize-bed showed that the bed height is mainly influenced by catalyst filling amount, linear speed of reaction gas and particle size of catalyst.
Being able to fluidize includes the kinetics of the deposition of the gas, in our case silane, which is important for yield, because unconverted silane lowers your granular poly yield.
